package.name: robot_descriptions
package.description:
Robot-agnostic data hub for URDF, MJCF, and mesh assets. Holds one subdirectory per robot or hand under robots/. No C++ headers, no framework-specific code; downstream packages consume files via ament share path or package://robot_descriptions/robots/<name>/...
Currently shipped: - robots/ur5e/ -- UR5e 6-DoF arm (URDF, MJCF, meshes) - robots/assm_v1/ -- 10-DoF custom hand "assm v1" (URDF xacro, MJCF) - robots/ur5e_assm_v1/ -- UR5e arm + assm_v1 hand combined (URDF xacro, MJCF scene)
Future robots/hands (allegro, leap, schunk, iiwa7, ...) drop in as additional robots/<name>/ subdirectories without touching downstream build graphs beyond their own YAML/launch references.
